q: Is there really a free version?
a: Yes! Our Starter plan is free for up to 5 invoices per month. We want to support freelancers and small creators as they grow.

q: Can I use my own logo and colors?
a: Absolutely. Custom branding is available on all paid plans, letting you tailor invoice design to your brand.
We take security seriously. Data is encrypted in transit and at rest (AES-256) and our infrastructure follows industry best practices.
